Installation: Hundreds of LED lights and plant debris used to imitate classical Chinese paintings
Installation: Feature-length film created entirely from surveillance/CCTV camera footage
Artist: Chinese contemporary artist frequently paired with Ai Weiwei in questions about contemporary Chinese art
